name: Dashboard shows memories count only once via the companion CTA
description: After fixing a UI duplication bug, the dashboard should show the 'memories to revisit' count exactly once — inside the companion router CTA panel. There should NOT be a second standalone card below it repeating the same number. This test confirms the fix prevents regression.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to finish loading
Verify the companion CTA panel is visible — it contains a clickable card with the text 'memories' or 'Revisit' and an arrow icon
Verify there is NO second standalone card below the CTA that also says 'Memories to revisit' with a large number. The memories count should appear only once on the page.
